It was performed by M. Ward.

PublishedAs: It was published as Volume One.
It was published as Volume Two.
It was published as A Very She & Him Christmas.
It was published as Christmas Party.
It was published as Melt Away: A Tribute to Brian Wilson.

It was published by Columbia Records.

It was published in Omaha, Nebraska.

It was written by John Lennon and Paul McCartney.
It was written by Patience and Prudence.
WrittenIn: It was written in Los Angeles.
